name: GLUCOBALANCE-3
description: A Phase 3 randomized trial evaluating the efficacy of GLP-1 receptor agonist combination therapy in Type 2 diabetes patients with inadequate glycemic control on metformin monotherapy.

name: MINDWELL-2
description: A Phase 2 double-blind trial of psilocybin-assisted therapy for treatment-resistant major depressive disorder in adults.

name: RENEW-1
description: A Phase 3 trial of a novel SGLT2 inhibitor for slowing progression of chronic kidney disease in patients with moderate renal impairment.
